data.title: Implement Error Boundary New York variant

data.description: Audit all 50+ components to ensure both default.rs and new_york.rs exist, create missing variants
data.title: Verify all components have New York variants

data.description: Create comprehensive tests for all New York theme variants to ensure parity with default theme
data.title: Add tests for New York variants

data.description: Create a new documentation file at `docs/design/THEME_DIFFERENCES.md` that lists each component in `packages/leptos/*/src/` with both `default.rs` and `new_york.rs` variants, documenting specific differences in styling (CSS classes), component structure, props, and behavior. Reference existing implementation files like `packages/leptos/tabs/src/new_york.rs` and `packages/leptos/combobox/src/new_york.rs` as examples, and verify the documentation is complete by checking that all components with theme variants are documented.
data.title: Document New York theme differences

data.description: Create theme switching integration tests in `packages/leptos/*/src/tdd_tests/` directories for components with New York variants (tabs, combobox, dialog). Add test functions using `wasm-bindgen-test` to verify that switching between default and New York theme variants via theme prop/context correctly updates rendered class names and component styles. Verify tests pass with `cargo test --package leptos-tabs --package leptos-combobox --package leptos-dialog` and confirm visual regression tests capture theme-specific differences.
data.title: Add theme switching tests

data.description:
Based on the THEME_DIFFERENCES.md document, here is the improved task description:

**Update packages/leptos/button/src/new_york.rs to add loading state support and keyboard event handling (Enter/Space keys) from default.rs, and add accessibility attributes (aria-label, aria-describedby, aria-busy). Verify the component compiles with `cargo build -p leptos-button` and confirm loading spinner displays when the loading prop is set to true in the example app at examples/leptos/src/new_york.rs.**
data.title: Verify theme consistency across components

data.description:
Add CLI command `cargo leptos-shadcn generate-theme --name <variant_name> --base <default|new_york>` to `packages/cli/src/` that scaffolds a new theme variant by:
1. Creating `<variant_name>.rs` in target component packages (e.g., `packages/leptos/button/src/`)
2. Duplicating base theme's component struct and props with variant-specific naming
3. Generating corresponding mod exports and `#[cfg(feature = "<variant_name>")]` gates in each component's `lib.rs`

Acceptance: Running `cargo leptos-shadcn generate-theme --name paris --base new_york` creates `packages/leptos/button/src/paris.rs` with `ParisButton` struct, updates `packages/leptos/button/src/lib.rs` to export it behind `paris` feature, and `cargo test --package leptos-button --features paris` passes.
data.title: Create theme component generator

data.description: Create `docs/migration/THEME_MIGRATION.md` documenting step-by-step process for migrating components from default to New York theme variants. Include code examples showing `ThemeVariant` enum usage, import path changes from `crate::default` to `crate::new_york`, and CSS variable overrides. Verify by testing migration guide on 3 existing components (Button, Card, Tabs) using `cargo test --package <component>` and confirming visual parity with storybook snapshots.
data.title: Create theme migration guide

data.description: Create/update visual test snapshots in `packages/visual-testing/tests/` for each component variant (default and new_york themes) using Playwright screenshot assertions. Update `packages/visual-testing/src/visual-tester.ts` to add a `capture_screenshot` function that generates PNG snapshots for all interactive states. Verify by running `npm test` in `packages/visual-testing/` and confirming baseline images are created in `packages/visual-testing/tests/baseline/`.
data.title: Add theme preview screenshots

data.description:
Based on my exploration of the codebase, I now understand the project structure. The error-boundary package already exists with basic functionality, and I can see the lazy-loading component has error handling gaps. Here's the improved task description:

Create `packages/leptos/error-boundary/src/new_york.rs` with New York-themed `ErrorBoundary` and `RichErrorBoundary` components that export from `default.rs`, then update `packages/leptos/lazy-loading/src/lib.rs` to wrap the `LazyComponent` function's error handling (lines 132-151) with `RichErrorFallback` from the error-boundary package. Verify by running `cargo test -p leptos-shadcn-error-boundary` and confirming lazy loading errors render with severity indicators and recovery suggestions.
data.title: Implement error boundaries for component loading

data.description: Implement intelligent retry logic for failed component loads with configurable backoff strategy
data.title: Add retry mechanism with exponential backoff

data.description: Design and implement clear, actionable error messages for all error scenarios
data.title: Create user-friendly error messages

data.description:
Now I have a clear understanding of the error-boundary package. Let me provide the improved task description:

**Update packages/leptos/error-boundary/src/lib.rs and packages/leptos/error-boundary/src/context.rs to add automatic error recovery functions that reset error state without page reload. Implement `clear_error()` method on ErrorContext and `reset_boundary()` callback in ErrorBoundary/RichErrorBoundary components that calls `set_has_error.set(false)` and optionally re-executes children. Add integration tests in packages/leptos/error-boundary/src/lib.rs verifying the reset restores normal rendering and preserves component state.**
data.title: Implement error recovery mechanisms

data.description: Create `packages/leptos/error-boundary/src/logging.rs` with a `tracing`-based error logger that captures component errors, stack traces, and metadata to console. Update `packages/leptos/error-boundary/src/lib.rs` to wire the logger into the `ErrorBoundary` component's fallback render. Add unit tests in `packages/leptos/error-boundary/src/tests/logging_tests.rs` verifying error events emit with correct severity levels and include component context.
data.title: Add error logging and monitoring

data.description: Create comprehensive error handling documentation in `docs/design/error-handling.md` covering patterns from `packages/shadcn/src/utils/errors.rs` and `packages/signal-management/src/error.rs`, including examples of ComponentError and SignalManagedError usage, custom error type creation guidelines, and integration patterns with Leptos's error-boundary component. Acceptance: Documentation includes at least 3 working code examples demonstrating error propagation, recovery strategies, and boundary integration, verified by running `cargo doc --no-deps` and confirming all error handling modules are documented.
data.title: Create error handling documentation

data.description: Implement a circuit breaker pattern in the signal-management system by creating `packages/signal-management/src/circuit_breaker.rs` with a `CircuitBreaker` struct that wraps async operations and transitions through Closed→Open→Half-Open states. Add `CircuitBreakerConfig` for threshold configuration and integrate the breaker into existing signal operations in `packages/signal-management/src/lib.rs`. Verify by adding unit tests in `packages/signal-management/tests/circuit_breaker_tests.rs` that confirm the circuit opens after 5 consecutive failures and allows recovery after the timeout period.
data.title: Implement circuit breaker pattern

data.description: Create comprehensive error recovery test suite in packages/leptos/error-boundary/src/tests/error_recovery.rs covering scenarios: component crash recovery with leptos-error-boundary::ErrorBoundary, signal recovery after error, and nested error boundary propagation. Add test functions test_component_crash_recovery(), test_signal_recovery_after_error(), and test_nested_error_boundary_propagation() using leptos::create_runtime() for isolated test environments. Verify all tests pass with cargo test --package error-boundary and achieve minimum 80% code coverage of error handling paths.
data.title: Create error recovery test suite

data.description: Create error rate monitoring dashboard in `packages/leptos/metrics/src/error_dashboard.rs` by adding a `ErrorRateDashboard` component that aggregates error counts from `packages/signal-management/src/error.rs` using the existing `ErrorTracker` struct. Display error rates per component with a breakdown by error type (SignalNotInitialized, ContextNotFound) and render a visual chart using `leptos_chart` or similar library. Verify the dashboard updates in real-time when errors occur in components and shows accurate error counts with timestamps.
data.title: Add error rate monitoring dashboard

data.description: Create E2E integration tests in `packages/leptos/*/tests/integration_tests.rs` to verify that multiple components (Dropdown, Dialog, Sheet, Popover, Command) can be rendered simultaneously without z-index conflicts, event propagation issues, or CSS selector collisions. Add tests combining 2+ interactive components in a single view, verify global state isolation and concurrent component lifecycle management, and ensure no `#[component]` macro conflicts when importing from different themed variants.
data.title: Complete component integration E2E tests

data.description: Create E2E performance threshold tests in packages/visual-testing/tests/ using Playwright to measure render times for Dialog, Dropdown Menu, and Sheet components from packages/leptos/*/src/. Add test functions that verify component initialization completes within 100ms and interactive operations respond within 50ms. Verify tests pass by running cargo test -p visual-testing and ensuring all performance assertions succeed with metrics logged to console output.
data.title: Add performance threshold tests

data.description: Create cross-browser test suite in `packages/visual-testing/` by extending `playwright.config.ts` to target Chrome, Firefox, WebKit (Safari), and Edge browsers. Add browser-specific test matrices to existing visual test files in `packages/visual-testing/tests/` using Playwright's `project` configuration with respective browser launchers. Verify by running `npm run test:visual` across all four browsers and confirming component snapshots match baseline within 0.1% threshold for components in `packages/leptos/`.
data.title: Add cross-browser compatibility tests

data.description:
Test all components across Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge

data.description: Add Playwright network throttling tests to packages/visual-testing/tests/ by creating a new test suite that simulates 3G and 4G network conditions using page.emulateNetwork() in test files. Implement tests for components with async loading (lazy-loading, command, combobox) to verify loading states render correctly under slow network. Acceptance: tests verify fallback UI appears during 500ms+ latency and components load successfully once network simulation completes.
data.title: Add network throttling tests

data.title: Add geolocation testing support

data.description: Optimize compilation settings, remove unused dependencies, implement code splitting
data.title: Reduce WASM bundle size below 2MB

data.description: Fix memory leaks in signal-managed components by implementing proper cleanup in `on_cleanup` handlers for `packages/leptos/button/src/signal_managed.rs`, `packages/leptos/dialog/src/signal_managed.rs`, `packages/leptos/popover/src/signal_managed.rs`, `packages/leptos/sheet/src/signal_managed.rs`, and `packages/leptos/toast/src/signal_managed.rs`. Ensure all `Effect::new()` calls, event listeners added via `leptos::ev`, and `spawn_local` tasks are cancelled/disposed when components unmount, and verify no dangling references remain by running `cargo test --package leptos-shadcn-ui --tests memory` and confirming all memory safety tests pass with 95%+ safety scores.
data.title: Fix memory leaks during component loading

data.description: Lazy load components to reduce initial bundle size
data.title: Implement code splitting for components

data.description: Create `packages/scripts/bundle-size_monitor/src/main.rs` to implement automated bundle size tracking that analyzes `.wasm` output sizes in `target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/` using `cargo metadata` and `binary-size` crate, generates size deltas in CI via `scripts/ci/check_bundle_size.sh`, and integrates with GitHub Actions to fail PRs when bundle size increases >5% compared to `main` branch baseline.
data.title: Implement bundle size monitoring

data.description: Create a `lazy-loading` component in `packages/leptos/lazy-loading/src/lib.rs` that exports a `<LazyLoad>` wrapper using Leptos's `Suspense` and `lazy` primitives. Implement the example at `examples/leptos/src/lazy_loading.rs` to demonstrate deferring component initialization until viewport intersection using the `IntersectionObserver` API. Verify lazy loading works by confirming the wrapped component's initialization code only executes after scrolling it into view.
data.title: Implement lazy load optimization

data.description: Update packages/leptos/lazy-loading/src/lib.rs to add a `LazyRoutes` component with route-based code splitting using `#[component] LazyRoutes` that accepts `routes: Vec<LazyRouteConfig>` and implements `spawn_local` for async loading, then add integration tests verifying lazy-loaded components render after load and bundle size decreases compared to eager loading.
data.title: Implement lazy load optimization

data.description: Implement code splitting for lazy-loaded components in `packages/leptos/lazy-loading/src/lib.rs` by wrapping `LazyLoaded` component with `leptos::lazy()` and ensuring component chunks are generated for each lazy-loaded module. Update `examples/leptos/src/lazy_loading.rs` to verify async component loading works correctly and network requests show separate chunk files are loaded on-demand. Confirm by building the example and checking browser network tab for separate `.wasm` chunks.
data.title: Implement component-level code splitting

data.description: Implement request deduplication in packages/signal-management/src/ to cache and deduplicate concurrent network requests using the existing SignalManager infrastructure. Add a request_cache module with deduplication logic keyed by request URL and parameters, integrating with the error handling in packages/signal-management/src/error.rs. Verify by creating unit tests in packages/signal-management/tests/ that confirm duplicate concurrent requests return cached results instead of making multiple network calls.
data.title: Implement request deduplication
